Patch Set 16:

test_26a now fails because per John's comment/request I no longer check that a hsm_remove request has [not] been created, but that archive file has [not] been removed. Since present patch version/set implementation uses mdt_agent_record_add() directly, to create a hsm_remove request, but don't wake-up CDT to handle it (ie, do not call mdt_hsm_cdt_wakeup()), test_26a() will need to wait for hsm/loop_period + some extra time before to check if file is still present or not in archive...

If the file was open when it is removed from the Lustre namespace then it won't be removed from the archive.

Perhaps MA_INODE is not valid in mdt_close().

parents.subject: LU-6391 llite: Add client mount opt to ignore suppress_pings

commit.subject: LU-4640 mdt: implement Remove Archive on Last Unlink policy
commit.message:
LU-4640 mdt: implement Remove Archive on Last Unlink policy

This patch introduces RAoLU policy where an implicit remove
request will be sent to archive/Agent upon last close of an
unlinked file.
Policy can be enabled/disabled using an lprocfs tunable.
If CDT not running, requests will be queued.

test_26[a-c] related tests have been also added in sanity-hsm.

This patch also contains a small fix to prevent unnecessary
progress infos to be gathered for REMOVE requests.

Patch now also handles cases where unlinked file is closed
from mdt_export_cleanup() after Client eviction. And
specific test_26d has been added in sanity-hsm.

Signed-off-by: Bruno Faccini <bruno.faccini@intel.com>
Change-Id: I7affb20b2834bcd0618412349fc3adc7f6744de0
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/14384
